flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Owensboro Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Owensboro Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Owensboro Community and Technical College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (21.8% → 25.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Owensboro Community and Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.6k).
